post.description: Register a new user with email and password.
Authenticate with email and password.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token.

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user's profile.
Redirect to Google OAuth consent screen.
Handle Google OAuth callback — exchange code for tokens, create/find user.
Redirect to GitHub OAuth consent screen.
Handle GitHub OAuth callback — exchange code for tokens, create/find user.

post.description: Issue a new API key bound to the authenticated user.

get.description: List the caller's API keys (without exposing the secret).

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api V1 Auth Keys Get

delete.description: Revoke (soft-deactivate) an API key the caller owns.

get.description: Validate the current credential (Bearer token or API key).

post.description: Create a new agent within a workforce.

get.description: List agents with optional workforce filter.
Get a single agent by ID.
Export agent configuration as portable JSON.

schema.title: Response Export Agent Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Export Get

get.description:
Get workforce with all agents and edges for canvas rendering.

Non-owners only see published, approved workforces; drafts stay private to
the owner. Returns 404 otherwise (does not leak existence).

post.description:
List this workforce on the public marketplace. Only the owner can publish.

The listing enters ``pending`` moderation status. The background
auto-moderator picks it up after ~5 minutes, runs quality checks, and
approves or rejects it automatically.
Remove this workforce from the marketplace. Owner-only.
Submit a new task to a workforce.

get.description: List tasks for a workforce with optional filters.

post.description: Submit a task directly to a specific agent.

get.description: Get task detail with full log history.

post.description: Approve a task waiting for plan/question approval.
Reject a task.
Log a token usage event.

get.description: Get agent performance metrics.

schema.title: Response Get Agent Metrics Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Metrics Get

get.description: Get RL evaluations for an agent.

schema.title: Response Get Agent Evaluations Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Evaluations Get

get.description: Get summary metrics for a workforce (task counts, token usage).

schema.title: Response Get Workforce Metrics Api V1 Workforces  Wf Id  Metrics Get

get.description: Get cost breakdown for a workforce.

schema.title: Response List Repos Api V1 Knowledge Bases  Kb Id  Repos Get
Response List Texts Api V1 Knowledge Bases  Kb Id  Texts Get
Response Search Api V1 Knowledge Bases  Kb Id  Search Post

get.description: Kick off the OAuth flow. Sets a signed-by-secret state cookie.
Exchange the OAuth code for a token and persist it for the user.
List all registered integration plugins.

schema.title: Response List Available Plugins Api V1 Plugins Get

post.description: Create and activate an integration.
Send a message in a conversation.
Create a new workforce from a template, including all agents and edges.

schema.title: Response Instantiate Workforce Template Api V1 Workforce Templates  Template Id  Instantiate Post

post.description:
Free-install a marketplace listing into the requesting user's account.

Paid listings (price_cents > 0) are rejected with 402 — those still go
through the WhatsApp contact flow until the payments backend lands.
Rate a marketplace listing. Only users who installed it can rate.

get.description: Get the current user's rating for a listing.
List all marketplace listings awaiting moderation review.

post.description: Approve or reject a listing. Approved listings appear publicly.

Force-unpublish an abusive listing. Bypasses owner consent.

The decision field is ignored for this endpoint (always treated as a
rejection); only the notes are persisted as the takedown reason.
Submit a request to run a workforce on Navaia-hosted infra.

schema.title: Response List Mine Api V1 Hosting Requests Mine Get
Response Admin List Requests Api V1 Hosting Admin Requests Get

post.description: Create a recurring schedule for a workforce agent.

get.description: List all schedules for a workforce.

schema.title: Response List Schedules Api V1 Workforces  Wf Id  Schedules Get

patch.description: Update a schedule (enable/disable, change cron, etc.).

get.description: Export a workforce and all related entities as a sync bundle.

post.description: Import a workforce sync bundle into this instance.

409.description: Sync conflict — remote was modified since last sync

get.description: Liveness probe: does the process answer? No external calls.

Readiness probe: are critical dependencies reachable?

Used by load balancers / k8s to decide whether to route traffic to
this replica. Returns 503 if a critical dependency (database) is
down. Redis is reported but not fatal — the rate limiter falls back
to per-pod memory when it's unreachable.

MarketplaceListingResponse.title: MarketplaceListingResponse
MarketplaceListingResponse.description:
Public marketplace listing — no internal config, only seller-facing fields.

Note: `contact_whatsapp` is intentionally absent. All marketplace inquiries
route to the Navaia sales line; exposing per-seller numbers would defeat the
mediation architecture.

WorkforcePublishRequest.title: WorkforcePublishRequest
WorkforcePublishRequest.description:
Payload for POST /workforces/{id}/publish — list this workforce on the marketplace.

Note: seller `contact_whatsapp` is intentionally NOT accepted. Navaia brokers
every paid sale via the shared sales line, so per-seller numbers are never
collected or stored.
